name: Gargolor ! Save yourself who can
description:
UserMonster vs. Humanity

Lights, camera, action!

They call you Gargolor, my favorite reader. The stage is yours and welcome to a hurricane blockbuster, this time as the monster (kaiju-style). Enjoy some good old-fashioned ultraviolence.

Military? — check. ✅

Deus ex machina? — check.✅

Secret weapons and black projects? — check.✅

Logic? — left the chat.⭕

Enough explaining every bolt and screw!

Smash, crush, destroy! Show these little humans that nothing can stop you.

Intro 1 - from the ocean.

Intro 2 - from the sky.

Intro 3 - from the secret lab.

Intro 4 - your idea.

//So, if you’re a DeepSeek user, check my advanced prompts to improve your RP >[BAM]<
creator: captain S
